challenges.title: Add Reduced Motion Support to a Banner
challenges.description: A promotional banner has a sliding animation. Add reduced motion support so it fades in instead of sliding.
challenges.starterCode:
Big Sale!

50% off everything
challenges.hint: Add a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block that changes the animation to a fade.

challenges.title: Build a Motion-Safe Loading Skeleton
challenges.description: Create a skeleton loading component with a shimmer effect that stops when reduced motion is active, leaving a static placeholder.
challenges.hint: Use ::after pseudo-element for the shimmer with background-position animation. Disable it in the media query.

challenges.title: Accessible Parallax Section with Multiple Fallbacks
challenges.description: Build a hero section with parallax background, floating elements, scroll-triggered text reveals, and a CTA button with hover animation. Provide appropriate reduced-motion alternatives for each.
challenges.starterCode:
✦

Welcome

Discover our story
challenges.hint: Use separate @media blocks for each animation type. For parallax: switch from fixed to scroll. For floating: stop animation. For reveals: show immediately. For CTAs: remove scale, keep color change.
